bull.b: ClearSign's products are getting a positive reception as indicated by order wins from brand name customers.
The strategic partnership with Zeeco to launch a co-branded process burner line is expected to expand ClearSign’s market reach and boost order flow and revenues.

bear.b: There are several risks associated with the company including dilution, execution, engineering, technology, competition, and regulatory risks.
Long sales and design-in timelines and push-outs in deployments have prevented a steady build-up in backlog and therefore the revenue performance.
